creator: jilles@FreeBSD.org
text:
from pointyhat's attempt to 'make install' this:
/work/a/ports/sysutils/lugtools/work/lugtools-0.2.0/install: 1: Syntax error: Unterminated quoted string
/work/a/ports/sysutils/lugtools/work/lugtools-0.2.0/install: 122: Syntax error: Error in command substitution

Fix: 

Roll new upstream release with fixed 'install' file as in
shells/shell-include and dns/ldnsm.
How-To-Repeat: Try to build and install the port using /bin/sh with r197691 change in it.
